assertions.title: Shared Media Response Parsing Respects Binary, Text, JSON, and SSE Modes

steps.expected: Mocked media parser chooses JSON, text, binary, and SSE decode paths without cross-mode leakage

steps.action: Inspect test coverage for decode-path selection
steps.expected: JSON transcription, plain-text translation, binary speech, and SSE image streaming are each asserted independently
steps.observed: The test asserts transcription JSON payload text="transcribed", translation text payload="translated text", speech output bytes=[1,2,3,4], and image SSE yields ordered partial/completed events

evidence.network: Mocked server sequence returned application/json, text/plain, audio/mpeg, and text/event-stream responses in order; the passing test confirms the parser selected the corresponding decode path for each response mode.

assertions.title: Multimodal Request Composition Preserves Ordered Text, Image, and Audio Inputs on Supporting Surfaces

steps.expected: Mixed content arrays preserve order and media metadata across supported request builders
Responses input preserves input_text -> input_image -> input_audio ordering with detail/format metadata, and chat completions preserve text -> image_url -> input_audio ordering
steps.observed: The test validates responses parts with type/text/image_url/detail/input_audio.format=mp3 and chat parts with type/text/image_url.url/detail/input_audio.format=wav in original order; a companion test confirms response image parts retain detail=original while chat image parts serialize supported detail values

evidence.network: Mocked captured request bodies verified ordered content arrays and preserved media metadata fields across responses and chat request serialization.

assertions.title: Multimodal input composition preserves ordered text/image/file parts

steps.expected: Responses multimodal message serialization preserves ordered text/image/file parts without flattening or field renaming
Serialized parts preserve input_text, input_image.file_id/detail, and input_file file_id/file_url/file_data/filename fields in order
steps.observed: The test validates ordered parts for input_text, input_image(file_id + detail), input_file(file_id), input_file(file_url), and input_file(file_data + filename), and confirms no unrelated image_url field leaks onto input_file entries

evidence.network: Mocked captured request body preserved ordered response content items and field names: image_url remained specific to input_image while file_id/file_url/file_data/filename stayed on input_file parts.

summary: Validated 3 assigned assertions through mocked cargo tests. VAL-MEDIA-008, VAL-MEDIA-009, and VAL-RESP-010 all passed; command outputs were captured under mission evidence, and source inspection confirmed the assertion-to-test mapping plus the expected decode-path and request-serialization details.
